case_title: JESUS SICAIROS VS. MARIA JEANETTE RIOS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) RALPH MORENO; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-20-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SICAIROS, JESUS SERVED JUL-01-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, MARIA JEANETTE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
